title: Strict Content Security Policy (CSP)
description: Architect a strict Content Security Policy (CSP) to enhance client-side security. Design nonce-based or hash-based CSPs to prevent unauthorized script execution and data exfiltration.
objectives: Architect a strict Content Security Policy (CSP) to enhance client-side security.
Design nonce-based or hash-based CSPs to prevent unauthorized script execution and data exfiltration.
